passive.name: Ionian Fervor
passive.description: When Irelia strikes enemies with spells she gains stacking bonus Attack Speed. At maximum stacks she also gains bonus damage on hit.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate:}} {{cis|Irelia}} abilities generate a stack of ''Ionian Fervor'' for each enemy champion hit, as well as one stack if she hits at least one non-champion. Basic attacks against enemy {{tip|champions}}, {{tip|turrets}} and large {{tip|monsters}} will also refresh the duration.
wiki_detail.blurb2: {{sbc|Innate - Unsteady:}} Enemy {{tip|champions}} and large {{tip|monsters}} hit by ''{{ai|Flawless Duet|Irelia}}'' and ''{{ais|Vanguard's Edge|Irelia}}'' initial barrage are [[File:Bladesurge 2.png|20px]] marked. The mark can be consumed by ''{{ai|Bladesurge|Irelia}}''.
wiki_detail.blurb4:
{{sbc|Ionian Fervor:}} For each stack, '''Irelia''' gains {{sti|{{as|bonus attack speed}}}}. At maximum stacks, her basic attacks deal {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}}.
Basic attacks against enemy {{tip|champions}} and large {{tip|monsters}} will also refresh the duration.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate:}} '''Irelia''' generates a [[stack]] of ''Ionian Fervor'' for each enemy champion hit by her [[Champion ability|abilities]], or if she hits at least one non-champion, lasting for 6 seconds, refreshing on basic attacks and ability hits against enemy {{tip|champions}} and large {{tip|monster|monsters}}, and stacking up to 4 times.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Ionian Fervor:}} For each stack, '''Irelia''' gains {{sti|{{as|{{pp|7.5 to 25|key=%}} '''bonus''' attack speed}}}}, up to a maximum of {{as|{{pp|7.5*4 to 25*4|key=%}}|attack speed}}. At maximum stacks, '''Irelia's''' [[basic attack]]s are empowered to deal {{as|{{pp|10 to 61}}|magic damage}} {{as|(+ 20% '''bonus''' AD)}} {{as|'''bonus''' magic damage}} {{tip|on-hit}}.
wiki_detail.description3: {{sbc|Innate - Unsteady:}} Enemy {{tip|champions}} and large {{tip|monsters}} hit by ''{{ai|Flawless Duet|Irelia}}'' and ''{{ais|Vanguard's Edge|Irelia}}'' initial barrage are {{as|marked|buzzword}} as ''Unsteady'' for 5 seconds. The mark can be consumed by ''{{ai|Bladesurge|Irelia}}''.
wiki_detail.notes:
* The attacks do not deal the '''bonus''' damage against [[structures]].
* {{Pending for test}}: Parry interactions ({{tip|block}}, {{tip|dodge}}, and {{tip|blind}}).
* ''Ionian Fervor'' stacks are represented by a counter under '''Irelia's''' [[health bar]]. It is highlighted while the ability is at its maximum effect.

Q.name: Bladesurge
Q.description: Irelia dashes forward to strike her target, healing herself. If the target is Marked or dies to Bladesurge, its cooldown refreshes.
Q.tooltip:
Irelia dashes to an enemy, dealing {{ championdamage }} physical damage and restoring {{ healamount }} Health to herself. If the enemy dies or was Unsteady, the Cooldown is refreshed.

Deals {{ miniondamage }} damage to minions.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Irelia}} {{tip|dashes}} through the target enemy, dealing {{as|physical damage}}, applying {{tip|on-hit}} effects, and {{tip|heal|healing}} herself.
wiki_detail.blurb2: If this attack kills the target, the cooldown is {{sti|ah|reset}}. Whenever a [[File:Bladesurge 2.png|20px]] mark is consumed, the cooldown is {{sti|ah|reduced}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Irelia''' {{tip|dashes}} 100 units through the target enemy's location, and upon collision or dash completion, she deals {{as|physical damage}}, applies {{tip|on-hit}} effects, and {{tip|heal|heals}} herself. ''Bladesurge'' deals {{as|{{pp|55 to 259}} '''bonus''' physical damage}} to {{tip|minions}}.
wiki_detail.description2: ''Bladesurge's'' {{sti|'''current''' cooldown}} is reduced to {{fd|0.2}} seconds upon collision of targets {{as|marked|buzzword}} as ''{{cci|Bladesurge 2.png|Irelia/LoL#Ionian Fervor|Unsteady}}'', and is {{tt|reset|The check's cadence is 0.0625 seconds, or a bit less than 2 game ticks}} if the target dies to or during ''Bladesurge's'' dash.
wiki_detail.description3: ''{{ai|Flawless Duet|Irelia}} can be cast during the dash.''
wiki_detail.notes:
* ''Bladesurge'' will be buffered and cast when the cooldown ends or is reset if the player attempts to cast it within {{fd|0.5}} seconds of the cooldown ending/resetting.
* ''Bladesurge'' deals {{tip|basic damage}}, but also triggers spell effects by dealing an additional 0 {{tip|spell damage}}.
* If the target dies during ''Bladesurge's'' dash, the cooldown is fully refunded and '''Irelia''' may also cast her other abilities during the dash.
* If the target dies to ''Bladesurge'' and was also {{as|marked|buzzword}}, the cooldown is still fully refunded.
* ''Bladesurge'' will only allow '''Irelia''' to dash through walls if there is enough space for her on the other side.
* ''Bladesurge'' deals its damage and consumes {{as|marks|buzzword}} when '''Irelia''' collides with the target, or at the end of the dash if the target moves away.
** ''Bladesurge'' will not deal damage if the {{tip|dash}} is {{tip|interrupt|interrupted}} beforehand.
*** The damage will be dealt if the target is in collision range when the dash is interrupted however.
*** {{si|Flash}} will interrupt the {{tip|dash}} but '''Irelia''' will still collide with and deal damage to her target if the blink leaves her in contact with it at the new location.
** '''Irelia''' will complete her remaining dash distance even if the damage is dealt earlier.
** If the target is {{tip|untargetable}}, ''Bladesurge'' will instead deals its damage at the end of the dash, rather than on collision.
* '''Irelia''' will automatically be ordered to [[Basic attack#Acquisition|acquire]] and attack ''Bladesurge's'' target as soon as the dash completes. 
** If a different target than ''Bladesurge's'' is selected during the dash, she will [[Basic attack#Acquisition|acquire]] that different target instead.

W.name: Defiant Dance
W.description: Irelia charges a strike that deals more damage as she charges. She takes reduced physical damage during the charge.
W.tooltip:
Begin Charging: Irelia enters a defensive stance for up to {{ maxduration }} seconds, becoming unable to act but reducing physical damage taken by {{ finalphysicaldr }}% and magic damage taken by {{ finalmagicdr }}%.

Release: Irelia lashes out with her blades, dealing {{ mindamagecalc }} physical damage increased up to {{ maxdamagecalc }} based on charge time.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Irelia''' {{tip|channel|charges}} for up to {{fd|1.5}} seconds, during which she increases ''Defiant Dance's'' damage over the first {{fd|0.75}} seconds of the channel and reduces incoming {{as|physical damage}} by {{pp|40 to 70|key=%}} {{as|(+ 7% per 100 AP)}} and incoming {{as|magic damage}} by {{pp|20 to 35|key=%}} {{as|(+ {{fd|3.5}}% per 100 AP)}}.
wiki_detail.description2: ''Defiant Dance'' can be recast within the duration, and does so automatically afterwards. ''Defiant Dance's'' charge cannot be {{tip|interrupt|interrupted}} by {{tip|crowd control}}.
wiki_detail.description3: {{sbc|Recast:}} '''Irelia''' swipes her blades in the target direction, dealing {{as|physical damage}} to enemies around her and within a line, increased by {{pp|key=%|type=channel time|0 to 200 for 11|0 to 0.75|formula=20% per 0.075 seconds. ''This is capped at 0.75 seconds.''}}. She also retains the damage reduction for {{fd|0.5}} seconds.
wiki_detail.leveling3: {{st|Minimum Physical Damage|{{ap|10 to 70}} {{as|(+ 40% AD)}} {{as|(+ 40% AP)}}|Maximum Physical Damage|{{ap|10*3 to 70*3}} {{as|(+ 120% AD)}} {{as|(+ 120% AP)}}}}
wiki_detail.description4: ''Defiant Dance's recast can be used while affected by {{tip|cast-inhibiting crowd control}}. If {{ai|Ionian Fervor|Irelia}} would expire during the charge, it will instead refresh every {{fd|0.25}} seconds for the remaining charge and be retained for {{fd|0.5}} seconds after the recast is initiated.''
wiki_detail.range: {{tip|cr|icononly = true}} {{tt|775|Recast swipe missile range}} / {{tt|895|Recast swipe total range}}
wiki_detail.effect radius: {{tip|cr|icononly = true}} {{tt|300|Recast point blank radius}} /  {{tt|120|Recast 'lollipop' radius at end of missile range}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* Enemies around '''Irelia''' will be dealt the damage once the recast's cast time ends, while enemies within the line are dealt the damage via a missile that reaches the furthest targets after a {{rutngt|0.05}} delay after the recast's cast time.
* Quick Casting utilizes hold-and-release for the two casts.
* ''Defiant Dance'' reaches 100% physical damage reduction at {{as|{{pp|{{#expr:(1-0.4)/0.0007 round 2}} to {{#expr:(1-0.7)/0.0007 round 2}}}} AP}}.
* ''Defiant Dance'' reaches 100% magic damage reduction at {{as|{{pp|{{#expr:(1-0.2)/0.00035 round 2}} to {{#expr:(1-0.35)/0.00035 round 2}}}} AP}}.
* ''Defiant Dance'' will also recast automatically upon entering {{tip|resurrection}}.
{{Effect at cast time end}}
** This refers to the recast.
* The following table refers for interactions while '''Irelia''' is {{tip|channel|channeling}}:
{{ct|charge|cast=false|items=false|move=false|consume=Disabled, but can still use trinkets|spells=true,false,false,false,recasts|interrupts=death}}
wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Irelia}} {{tip|channel|charges}} up for a brief moment, during which she gains damage reduction and increases ''Defiant Dance's'' damage. ''Defiant Dance'' can be recast within the duration, and does so automatically afterwards. The charge cannot be {{tip|interrupt|interrupted}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2: {{sbc|Recast:}} '''Irelia''' swipes her blades in the target direction, dealing {{as|physical damage}} to enemies nearby and within a line, increased based on how long she charged up.

E.name: Flawless Duet
E.description: Irelia sends out two blades which converge on each other. Enemies caught in between are damaged, stunned and Marked.
E.tooltip:
Irelia throws a blade into the ground and can Recast for up to {{ buffduration }} seconds. 

Recast: Irelia throws a second blade, then they fly towards each other Stunning for {{ stunduration }} seconds and dealing {{ totaldamage }} magic damage. Champions and large jungle monsters become Unsteady for {{ markduration }} seconds.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb:
{{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Irelia}} sends a blade to the target location for a short time.

''Flawless Duet'' can be recast within the duration, and does so automatically after the duration. The recast cannot be {{tip|interrupt|interrupted}}.
wiki_detail.blurb2: {{sbc|Recast:}} '''Irelia''' sends a second blade to the target location, or to her current position if ''Flawless Duet'' was recast automatically.
wiki_detail.blurb3: Once both blades have been placed, they converge to deal {{as|magic damage}} and {{tip|stun}} enemies within a line between.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Irelia''' sends a blade to the target location for {{fd|3.5}} seconds. ''Flawless Duet'' can be recast after {{fd|0.15}} seconds while the blade is active, and does so automatically at the end of its duration, though not if she is unable to cast abilities.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Recast:}} '''Irelia''' sends a second blade to the target location, or to her current position if ''Flawless Duet'' was recast automatically.
wiki_detail.description3: Once both blades have been placed, they fly toward each other regardless of distance and converge over {{fd|0.25}} seconds, afterwards dealing {{as|magic damage}} to all enemies within a line between them and {{tip|stun|stunning}} them for {{fd|0.75}} seconds, during which they are {{tip|standard sight|revealed}}.
wiki_detail.description4: ''Flawless Duet's recast can be used during {{ai|Bladesurge|Irelia}} and the cast time of {{ai|Vanguard's Edge|Irelia}}. Each of the blades' travel times are {{rutngt|0.25}}. Flawless Duet will cast at max range if cast beyond that.''
wiki_detail.notes:
* Both casts count as an ability activation for the purposes of on-cast effects such as {{tip|Spellblade}} and triggering {{ais|Force Pulse|Kassadin}} passive.
** If the ability is not manually recasted, the secondary effect will trigger and it will be considered as an ability activation. This is the only ability with this interaction in the game.
* ''Flawless Duet'' will recast automatically at its end during {{ai|Defiant Dance|Irelia}} despite being disabled.
* ''Flawless Duet'' will also recast automatically upon entering {{tip|resurrection}}.
* The outgoing blades will stop flight upon touching {{tip|projectile}} blocking effects. The converging blades will instead be destroyed upon contact with such effects.
** The blades will not stun nor deal damage if they fail to converge (i.e {{cai|Wind Wall|Yasuo}}).
* Both of ''Flawless Duet's'' casts will be buffered and cast when their cooldowns end if the player attempts to cast each within {{fd|0.3}} seconds of their cooldown ending.

R.name: Vanguard's Edge
R.description: Irelia fires a massive number of blades that explode outward upon hitting an enemy champion. Enemies hit by the blades are damaged and Marked. Afterwards the blades form a wall that will damage and slow enemies that walk through it.
R.tooltip: Irelia launches a barrage of blades, dealing {{ missiledamage }} magic damage and making champions and large jungle monsters Unsteady for {{ markduration }} seconds. The barrage explodes into a cage around the first champion hit for {{ zoneduration }} seconds. The cage deals {{ zonedamage }} magic damage and Slows by {{ slowamount }}% for {{ ccduration }} seconds.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Irelia}} launches a barrage of blades in the target direction that expand outward upon hitting an enemy champion, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to enemies hit.
wiki_detail.blurb2: After expanding, the blades form a spade-shaped perimeter around the enemy champion hit for a short time. Enemies that pass through the blades for the first time are dealt {{as|magic damage}} and {{tip|slow|slowed}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Passive:}} ''{{ais|Bladesurge|Irelia}}'' {{sti|'''total''' cooldown}} is reduced by a flat amount.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Irelia''' launches a barrage of blades in the target direction, expanding outward upon hitting an enemy champion, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to all enemies hit and {{tip|standard sight|revealing}} them for 1 second.
wiki_detail.description3: After expanding, the blades drop on the ground, knocking all enemy units away from them, though not rendering them {{tip|airborne}}, and forming a spade-shaped perimeter around the enemy champion hit for {{fd|2.5}} seconds that grants {{tip|sight}} of its surroundings. Enemies that pass through the blades for the first time are dealt the same {{as|magic damage}} and are {{tip|slow|slowed}} by 90% for {{fd|1.5}} seconds.
wiki_detail.description4: ''The perimeter will point at the same angle '''Irelia''' casted it from, but based on the target's center.''
